summary: Verified MCQ answers (sub_answer_1 and sub_answer_2) are now displaying correctly in Q&A Details tab of LiveProgressModal. The fix is working - Dent and Scratch severity badges appear below photos in the Exterior Inspection section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MCQ answers fix verified. The LiveProgressModal Q&A Details tab now correctly displays sub_answer_1 (Dent severity) and sub_answer_2 (Scratch severity) as badges below photos. Tested with inspection ID b7170ce1-349b-4899-abf8-35818d93962d (Singh, BR02BA4253). Backend API returns sub_answer_1 and sub_answer_2 fields correctly. Frontend code at lines 2679-2693 renders the badges with bg-blue-100 (Dent) and bg-orange-100 (Scratch) styling.

verified_features: Backend API returns sub_answer_1 and sub_answer_2 in live-progress endpoint
Frontend displays Dent badge (blue) with sub_answer_1 value
Frontend displays Scratch badge (orange) with sub_answer_2 value
Badges appear below photos in Q&A Details tab
Exterior Inspection section shows 5 questions with MCQ data
